outputs.description: docker.run.internal.asuser server configuration causes the software that is run inside of the Docker containers utilized by Cortex XSOAR to run as a non-root user account inside the container. The Ansible-Runner software is required to run as root as it applies its own isolation via bwrap to the Ansible execution environment.
